positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a cluster of bioluminescent flora and fauna, such as glowing mushrooms, stylized foxes, and crystal-winged hummingbirds. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, with strong silhouettes against a deep indigo and midnight blue gradient background. Use clean line work and high contrast for a pop-art yet ethereal feel. The overall style should be suitable for screen printing on dark fabric, focusing on crisp edges and vibrant glowing accents. Studio-quality illustration, vector art aesthetic, highly detailed, perfect for apparel print, deep field of view, volumetric lighting.
